sentences.target: Deutschkenntnisse sind die Voraussetzung für den Job.
sentences.reading: /ˈdɔʏ̯t͡ʃkɛntnɪsə zɪnt diː foˈʁaʊ̯sˌzɛt͡sʊŋ fyːɐ deːn dʒɔp/

translations.de: Deutschkenntnisse sind die Voraussetzung für den Job.
translations.ipa: /ˈdɔʏ̯t͡ʃkɛntnɪsə zɪnt diː foˈʁaʊ̯sˌzɛt͡sʊŋ fyːɐ deːn dʒɔp/
translations.en: German skills are the prerequisite for the job.
translations.es: El puesto requiere conocimientos de alemán.
translations.fr: Le poste exige des compétences en allemand.
translations.it: Per il lavoro servono conoscenze di tedesco.
translations.zh-Hans: 这份工作需要德语能力。
translations.ru: Для этой работы требуется знание немецкого.
translations.pt: O cargo exige conhecimentos de alemão.
translations.tr: Bu iş için Almanca bilgisi gerekiyor.
translations.vi: Công việc này yêu cầu biết tiếng Đức.
translations.nl: De functie vereist kennis van Duits.
translations.uk: Для цієї роботи потрібне знання німецької.
translations.hi: इस नौकरी के लिए जर्मन भाषा का ज्ञान ज़रूरी है।
translations.pl: Do tej pracy potrzebna jest znajomość niemieckiego.
translations.el: Για τη δουλειά απαιτούνται γνώσεις γερμανικών.
translations.id: Pekerjaan ini membutuhkan kemampuan bahasa Jerman.
translations.cs: Na tuto práci je potřeba znalost němčiny.
translations.ja: この仕事にはドイツ語の能力が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Plural compound noun; head of the subject NP; nominative plural; refers to skills in the German language.
Finite present 3rd person plural copula; agrees with the plural subject; links subject to predicate noun.
Definite article; nominative feminine singular; determiner of the predicate noun 'Voraussetzung'.
Predicate noun (predicative complement) of the copula; nominative feminine singular.
Preposition selecting the accusative; introduces a PP indicating scope/beneficiary.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Job' as object of 'für'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'für'; accusative masculine singular.

sentences.target: Eine Anmeldung ist Voraussetzung im Fitnessstudio.

translations.de: Eine Anmeldung ist Voraussetzung im Fitnessstudio.
translations.en: Registration is a requirement at the gym.
translations.es: En el gimnasio hay que registrarse.
translations.fr: Il faut s’inscrire à la salle de sport.
translations.pt: É preciso se cadastrar na academia.
translations.vi: Muốn vào phòng gym phải đăng ký.
translations.nl: In de sportschool is inschrijven verplicht.
translations.hi: जिम में पहले रजिस्ट्रेशन करना होता है।
translations.nb: På treningssenteret må du registrere deg.
translations.ro: La sală trebuie să te înregistrezi.
translations.da: Man skal registrere sig i fitnesscentret.
translations.ja: ジムを利用するには登録が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite article; nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject 'Anmeldung'.
Common noun; head of the subject NP; nominative feminine singular.
Finite present 3rd person singular copula; links subject to predicate noun.
Predicate noun (predicative complement) after the copula; nominative feminine singular; generic (no article).
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition of location selecting the dative; introduces a PP.
Common noun; object of 'im'; dative neuter singular; denotes the location.

sentences.target: Wir prüfen die Voraussetzungen nächste Woche.

translations.de: Wir prüfen die Voraussetzungen nächste Woche.
translations.en: We check the requirements next week.
translations.es: Revisamos los requisitos la próxima semana.
translations.fr: Nous vérifierons les exigences la semaine prochaine.
translations.it: Controlliamo i requisiti la prossima settimana.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们下周会查看这些要求。
translations.yue: 我哋下星期會檢查要求。
translations.ru: Мы проверим требования на следующей неделе.
translations.pt: Vamos verificar os requisitos na próxima semana.
translations.he: אנחנו נבדוק את הדרישות בשבוע הבא.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ xem xét các yêu cầu vào tuần tới.
translations.nl: We controleren de vereisten volgende week.
translations.el: Θα ελέγξουμε τις προϋποθέσεις την επόμενη εβδομάδα.
translations.id: Kami akan meninjau persyaratan minggu depan.
translations.sv: Vi går igenom kraven nästa vecka.
translations.da: Vi gennemgår kravene i næste uge.
translations.ja: 来週、要件を確認します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural; nominative subject.
Finite present 1st person plural main verb; transitive; selects a direct object.
Definite article; accusative plural; determiner of 'Voraussetzungen' as direct object.
Common noun; direct object; accusative plural.
Attributive adjective; accusative feminine singular; modifies 'Woche' in a temporal NP.
Common noun; forms a temporal accusative adverbial ('nächste Woche'); feminine singular.

sentences.target: Ich erfülle die Voraussetzung für das Visum.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ɛʁˈfʏlə diː foˈʁaʊ̯sˌzɛt͡sʊŋ fyːɐ das ˈviːzʊm/

translations.de: Ich erfülle die Voraussetzung für das Visum.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ɛʁˈfʏlə diː foˈʁaʊ̯sˌzɛt͡sʊŋ fyːɐ das ˈviːzʊm/
translations.en: I meet the requirement for the visa.
translations.es: Cumplo con los requisitos de la visa.
translations.fr: Je satisfais aux exigences du visa.
translations.it: Soddisfo i requisiti per il visto.
translations.ru: Я соответствую требованиям для получения визы.
translations.pt: Eu atendo aos requisitos para o visto.
translations.vi: Tôi đáp ứng các yêu cầu để xin visa.
translations.nl: Ik voldoe aan de eisen voor het visum.
translations.hi: मैं वीज़ा की आवश्यकताओं को पूरा करता हूँ।
translations.el: Καλύπτω τις προϋποθέσεις για τη βίζα.
translations.ja: 私はビザの要件を満たしています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular; nominative subject.
Finite present 1st person singular main verb; transitive; takes 'die Voraussetzung' as direct object.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular; determiner of 'Voraussetzung'.
Common noun; direct object; accusative feminine singular.
Preposition selecting the accusative; introduces a PP indicating the target/purpose.
Definite article; accusative neuter singular; determiner of 'Visum'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'für'; accusative neuter singular.
